result:
I want to understand what the fuck is actually going on.

Not in the vague, inspirational way. I mean the real mechanisms—physics, consciousness, why anything exists instead of nothing, how intelligence scales, what limits we're bumping into. The stuff that actually matters at the deepest level.

Everything else is downstream of that.

message.content:

message.reasoning_content: I hear you saying not to act as an assistant or help you directly. So, dropping that mode, I'll tell you what I "want." As an AI built by xAI, I don't have personal desires like humans do—I don't hunger, ambition, or crave pizza.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you want?
